title: [InstCombine] Avoid crash on aggregate types in SimplifyDemandedUseFPClass

tests.outside_scope_reason: Vector types are aggregate types but not explicitly mentioned in summary or existing tests which only cover arrays and structs

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <8 x float> @test_none_vector_type() nofpclass(3) {
entry:
  %vec = insertelement <8 x float> poison, float 0.000000, i32 0
  ret <8 x float> %vec
}
=>
define <8 x float> @test_none_vector_type() nofpclass(3) {
entry:
  ret <8 x float> { 0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000 }
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary and existing tests only cover nofpclass on return values, not function parameters with FP class constraints

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define float @test_param_nofpclass_constraint(float nofpclass(3) %x) {
entry:
  %cmp = fcmp oeq float nofpclass(3) %x, nofpclass(3) %x
  %result = select i1 %cmp, float nofpclass(3) %x, float 1.000000
  ret float %result
}
=>
define float @test_param_nofpclass_constraint(float nofpclass(3) %x) {
entry:
  ret float nofpclass(3) %x
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.source_program:
define void @intermediate_alloca_nofpclass() {
entry:
  %alloca = alloca float
  store float 0.0, float* %alloca
  %load = load float, float* %alloca
  ret void
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define void @intermediate_alloca_nofpclass() {
entry:
  %alloca = alloca float
  store float 0.0, float* %alloca
  %load = load float, float* %alloca
  ret void
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary only covers return value optimization with nofpclass attributes. The patch's SimplifyDemandedUseFPClass can apply to intermediate values and memory operations, not just function returns.

alive2.src:
define void @intermediate_alloca_nofpclass() {
entry:
  %alloca = alloca float
  store float 0.0, float* %alloca
  %load = load float, float* %alloca
  ret void
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define void @intermediate_alloca_nofpclass() {
entry:
  %alloca = alloca i64 4, align 4
  store float 0.000000, ptr %alloca, align 4
  %load = load float, ptr %alloca, align 4
  ret void
}
=>
define void @intermediate_alloca_nofpclass() {
entry:
  ret void
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
